zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Stourton於大約1455年出生在英國時，她的父親William Stourton 2nd Baron Stourton25歲，母親Margaret Chidiocke22歲。她於大約1476年與Sir James Chudleigh在英國結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1480年之後在英國戴文。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret Stourton于大约1455年出生在英国时，她的父亲William Stourton 2nd Baron Stourton25岁，母亲Margaret Chidiocke22岁。她于大约1476年与Sir James Chudleigh在英国结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1480年之后在英国戴文。

nameMeanings.name: Stourton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: 1  English: locative name from any of three places named Stourton (Staffs, Wilts, Warwicks).
3 English: locative name, perhaps occasionally from Storrington (Sussex), which is recorded as Storgetune in 1086.

variants.name: Sturton
meanings: 1  English: locative name from Sturton le Steeple (Notts), Great Sturton (Lincs), Sturton by Stow (Lincs), or possibly Sturton (Northumb), all of which place-names share the same etymology and early spellings as   Stratton  .

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Stourton was born about 1455, in England, her father, William Stourton 2nd Baron Stourton, was 25 and her mother, Margaret Chidiocke, was 22. She married Sir James Chudleigh about 1476, in England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 3 daughters. She died after 1480, in Devon, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Stourton est née environ 1455, à Angleterre, son père, William Stourton 2nd Baron Stourton, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Margaret Chidiocke, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé Sir James Chudleigh environ 1476, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée après 1480, à Devon, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret Stourton um 1455 in England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William Stourton 2nd Baron Stourton 25 und ihre Mutter Margaret Chidiocke 22. Sie hat um 1476 in England Sir James Chudleigh geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb nach 1480 in Devon, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Stourton è nata il circa 1455 nel England, sua padre, William Stourton 2nd Baron Stourton, aveva 25 anni e sua madre, Margaret Chidiocke, aveva 22 anni. Lei sposato Sir James Chudleigh circa 1476, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 3 figlie. Morì dopo il 1480, nel Devon, England.

ja.Wiltshire, England: イギリスウィルトシュアイア
ja.Ashton, Devon, England: イギリスデボンアシュトン
ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Stourtonが約1455年にイギリスで生まれた時，父William Stourton 2nd Baron Stourtonは25歳，母Margaret Chidiockeは22歳であった。約1476年にイギリスでSir James Chudleighと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1480年以後にイギリスデボンで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Stourton(이)가 대략 1455년 영국에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Stourton 2nd Baron Stourton(은)는 25세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Chidiocke(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 대략 1476년 영국에서 Sir James Chudleigh(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1480년 이후 영국 데폰에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Stourton nasceu aproximadamente 1455, em Inglaterra, seu pai, William Stourton 2nd Baron Stourton, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Chidiocke, tinha 22 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir James Chudleigh aproximadamente 1476, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu após 1480, em Devon, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Stourton родилась около 1455 г. в местности Англия, её отцу по имени William Stourton 2nd Baron Stourton было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Chidiocke, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir James Chudleigh около 1476 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла после 1480 г. в местности девон, Англия.

sm.about 1455–after 1480: e tusa o le 1455–ina ua ma'ea le 1480

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margaret Stourton nació aproximadamente 1455, en Inglaterra, su papá, William Stourton 2nd Baron Stourton, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Margaret Chidiocke, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Sir James Chudleigh aproximadamente 1476, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió después de 1480, en Devon, Inglaterra.
